title: Pretty Without Shaders
description: A small client side modpack that tries to make vanilla minecraft look pretty without shaders!
body:
A small client side modpack making vanilla minecraft look as pretty as possible without shaders

 

Features...

🌟Download Texturepacks IN GAME!

🌟Visual Improvements

🌟Audio Improvements

🌟Server Friendly

🌟Dynamic Music

🌟QOL Changes

 

🛑Most of the mods in the pack is configurable. If you don't like something about a particular mod you can configure it or just disable it

 

Sponsored by Bisect Hosting

Bisect Hosting offers 20 server locations and an automated modpack installer for a seamless gaming experience, and it is what me and many others having been using for great server hosting experiences. If you would like to support me you can use my code "DEY" when purchasing a bisect hosting server, It helps me way more than you think it does. Thank you!
